category_sources: source_facts.description says it generates clients, server stubs, and docs from an OpenAPI spec; official docs at https://swagger.io/docs/open-source-tools/swagger-codegen/codegen-v3/about/ describe Swagger Codegen as generating API clients, server stubs, and documentation.
display_name_sources: official Swagger docs at https://swagger.io/docs/open-source-tools/swagger-codegen/codegen-v3/about/ use the display name Swagger Codegen; source_facts.name is swagger-codegen.
docs_sources: Official swagger.io documentation is the dedicated docs surface; official GitHub README and wiki are linked from the project docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated as https://github.com/swagger-api/swagger-codegen; per instruction repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official Swagger Codegen docs identify OpenAPI/Swagger input, API client generation, server stub generation, and documentation generation.
